subject: [UUI] NLP for IBN helm chart
commit_message:

NLP component added to UUI

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> retrieving assets at run time is forbidden: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//125362-3/k8s/k8s/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-uui-nlp-868c4db6f-86lqw-uui-nlp-logs.html

We checked the log link you sent, but the log is incomplete. We didn't find any problems from the displayed log. How can we get the complete log and see the error message. 
In addition, we have solved the problem caused by using "wget" last time.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3:
> > 
> > retrieving assets at run time is forbidden: https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//125362-3/k8s/k8s/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-uui-nlp-868c4db6f-86lqw-uui-nlp-logs.html
> 
> We checked the log link you sent, but the log is incomplete. We didn't find any problems from the displayed log. How can we get the complete log and see the error message. 
> In addition, we have solved the problem caused by using "wget" last time.

You must not download things at run time.
In your Dockerfile, you're doing that at run:
https://github.com/onap/usecase-ui-nlp/blob/master/standalone/src/main/assembly/run.sh#L19-L20

You must do it at build time.
I've created https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/usecase-ui/nlp/+/125574 in order to solve this
